title: Graduate `roster` skill to typed WorkflowModel + OperatingProtocolModel
description: Application bead 2/5 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. After wd-graduation pilot validates the pattern, apply to roster: (1) read ~/.claude/skills/roster/SKILL.md; (2) author roster-workflow.json with typed WorkflowGraphNodes for each subcommand (list / analyze / suggest), the swift-agent-cli CLI invocation, output parsing, header rendering; (3) author roster-sop.md + OperatingProtocolModel instance; (4) Tier 3 tests; (5) validate end-to-end. Roster is simpler than wd — a good follow-on validation that the doctrine generalizes.
